body:
closes https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/1777 - This PR adds a `CompositeDataLoader` struct which is composed from different data loaders and you get call `get` from this data loader.

As of now, this data loader is compatible with all available data loaders because all data loaders implement the same interface for the `get` function. This might change in the future if any of the future data loaders need to support keyword arguments for the `get` function.
title: Add composite data loader

body: Due to the MPI trampoline [issues](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaModules/issues/48), I split MPI out from climacommon. This PR adds MPI back in and marks relevant jobs as soft-fail
title: Temporarily mark MPI jobs soft-fail
